diagnostic_action_policy.rule: Before suggesting that a pass be disabled for isolation, check whether the pass is required, structural/dependency-sensitive, or optional. Never suggest disabling a required or structural pass. For unknown passes, do not suggest disabling unless the user or current code/config proves it is safe.
diagnostic_action_policy.config_api_caveat: The current Python PassConfigKey only exposes KEY_DUMP_GRAPH. Do not invent pypto.PassConfigKey.KEY_DISABLE_PASS / KEY_HEALTH_CHECK examples. If a non-dump pass config is needed, say to use tile_fwk_config.json or the project-supported config path.

required_passes.reason: Required scheduling pass. Downstream sync, VF tuning, copyout resolve, and codegen rely on its scheduled op order, memory ranges, spill output, and checker invariants.
allowed_debug_actions: Compare graph dumps before and after OoOSchedule without disabling the pass.
Dump schedInfoMap_, localBufferMap_, tensorOccupyMap, issueQueues, allocIssueQueue, and generated spill ops.
forbidden_suggestions: Disable OoOSchedule to see whether the issue disappears.
Turn off OoOScheduler as a workaround.
Bypass OoO schedule in a normal PVC2_OOO pipeline.

optional_optimization_passes.reason: Optimization pass that removes equivalent operations. It can be temporarily disabled in a local isolation run to check whether an elimination introduced a graph/precision regression.
allowed_debug_actions: Temporarily set disable_pass only for CommonOperationEliminate in a local repro.
Compare graph dumps before and after COE.
If disabling COE changes the symptom, inspect skipped opcode guards and deleted operations rather than keeping COE disabled as the final fix.

feature_flag_alternatives.instead_of: disabling TuneTileOpSeqForVF / TuneSyncForVF as a pass

feature_flag_alternatives.prefer: pass.ooo_sched_mode such as HLF/GAPMIN, when supported

safe_alternatives_when_required_pass_is_: Enable pass dump/checker/health report for the required pass.
Compare pre-pass and post-pass graph invariants.
Use a smaller repro graph that still runs the required pass.
Prefer feature flags over pass disable when the code exposes a narrower switch.
Temporarily disable only optional upstream/downstream optimization passes whose policy allows it.
